title: aster bustillosianus
intro: Aster bustillosianus is a plant species, specifically a type of daisy or sunflower, known for its medicinal and edible properties. The plant has been found to possess anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which contribute to its medicinal value. The health benefits of Aster bustillosianus include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and exhibit antioxidant activity. Herbal preparations of the plant, such as infusions and decoctions, are traditionally used to treat various ailments, including fever, cough, and gastrointestinal issues.
